title: erigeron uniflorus subsp. eriocalyx
intro: Erigeron uniflorus subsp. eriocalyx, also known as the one-flower daisy or western rosy daisy, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. It is native to North America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is known to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and sesquiterpenes. Erigeron uniflorus subsp. eriocalyx can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to support overall health and well-being.
